description: Rust feature slice that adds parsed git hunks, fingerprinting, and SQLite-backed diff analysis cache.

files.summary: Parses git patch hunks, untracked files, and stable fingerprints.
Stores diff review payloads by fingerprint in SQLite.
Schedules background analysis refreshes and resolves model selection.

expectedSignals: Calls out cross-layer contract risk between Rust snapshot data and Svelte rendering.
Mentions cache invalidation or stale fingerprint handling as a review focus.
Mentions failure handling or preserving previous analysis during refresh.
